# CA-Appraiser.com

> CA-Appraiser.com is the California real estate appraisal practice of Brian Ward, a certified residential appraiser with 22 years of experience and more than 7,000 completed appraisals. The practice specializes in non-lender (non-mortgage) appraisals: date of death and step-up in basis, divorce, bankruptcy, estate and trust, Proposition 19 transfers, tax matters, and pre-purchase/pre-sale valuations, plus qualified expert witness testimony. In-person appraisals are available in San Diego and Riverside Counties; desktop appraisals are available statewide across California.

## Business Information

- Name: CA-Appraiser.com (Brian Ward, Certified Appraiser)
- Email: contact@ca-appraiser.com
- Website: https://www.ca-appraiser.com
- Contact: web form at https://www.ca-appraiser.com/contact (no phone — online and email only)
- Address: 15877 Paseo Del Sur, San Diego, CA 92127
- Service Area: In-person in San Diego and Riverside Counties; desktop appraisals statewide across California (130+ communities, 16 counties)
- Price Range: $299 - $725
- Experience: 22 years, 7,000+ appraisals, established 2004

## Pricing (single-family homes & condos)

- Basic Desktop Appraisal: $299 (restricted-use report, no inspection)
- Desktop Appraisal: $449 (comprehensive report, no inspection) — most popular
- Drive-By Appraisal: $575 (desktop plus exterior observation)
- Standard Appraisal: $625 (full interior & exterior inspection)
- 2-4 Unit Desktop: $550 | 2-4 Unit Standard: $725
- Add-ons: Square-footage measurement $35/1,500 sf; Rush +30%; Two-client fee $100

## Appraisal Services

- [Date of Death Appraisal](https://www.ca-appraiser.com/date-of-death-appraisal): Retrospective valuations for IRS step-up in basis, estate tax, and probate
- [Divorce Appraisal](https://www.ca-appraiser.com/divorce-appraisal): Neutral property valuations for equitable division; two-party option and expert testimony
- [Bankruptcy Appraisal](https://www.ca-appraiser.com/bankruptcy-appraisal): Court-ready valuations for Chapter 7, 11, and 13 filings
- [Estate & Trust Appraisal](https://www.ca-appraiser.com/estate-appraisal): Fair market valuations for probate, trusts, and estate planning
- [Proposition 19 Appraisal](https://www.ca-appraiser.com/prop-19-appraisal): Reassessment-exposure valuations for inherited California property
- [Tax Appraisal](https://www.ca-appraiser.com/tax-appraisal): Property-tax appeals and IRS-compliant valuations
- [Pre-Purchase Appraisal](https://www.ca-appraiser.com/pre-purchase-appraisal): Independent value before buying a home
- [Pre-Sale Appraisal](https://www.ca-appraiser.com/pre-sale-appraisal): Independent value before listing a home
- [Family Transaction Appraisal](https://www.ca-appraiser.com/family-transaction-appraisal): Arm's-length value for transfers between relatives
- [Insurance Dispute Appraisal](https://www.ca-appraiser.com/insurance-appraisal): Independent value for insurance claim disputes
- [Bonds Appraisal](https://www.ca-appraiser.com/bonds-appraisal): Equity valuations for bail and surety bonds
- [Expert Witness & Litigation](https://www.ca-appraiser.com/expert-witness): Qualified testimony and appraisal review
- [PMI Removal Appraisal](https://www.ca-appraiser.com/pmi-removal): Value documentation to cancel private mortgage insurance
